name: Product rating
description: Average rating from customers

description: Total number of ratings from customers

name: Google: Custom Product
description: Use to indicate whether or not the unique product identifiers (UPIs) GTIN, MPN, and brand are available for your product.

name: Energy efficiency class
description: Defines the energy efficiency rating of a product, e.g. A+++

name: Color
description: Defines the primary color or pattern, such as blue or striped

name: Light temperature
description: Defines the color characteristics of light sources, such as warm white or daylight

name: Bulb cap type
description: Specifies the type of cap or base a light bulb or fixture has, e.g. E12, GU10

name: Bulb shape
description: Describes the shape of lighting products, e.g. tube, spiral

name: Safety Note
description: Safety Note

name: Specifications
description: Product Specifications

name: Key Features
description: Key Features

name: Mounting type
description: Specifies how a product is installed or attached, such as clip-on or suction cup

name: Light color
description: Defines the color or hue of light, such as white or multicolor

name: FAQs
description: Query questions

name: Socket type
description: Identifies the type of socket in power outlets, such as USB or Ethernet

name: Material
description: Defines a product's primary material, such as cotton or wool

name: Candle shape
description: Describes the form of a candle, such as cylindrical or square

name: Power source
description: Specifies the power source a product uses to operate, such as solar or batteries

name: Item condition
description: Indicates the quality of an item, typically vehicles or vehicle parts; e.g. certified pre-owned, refurbished

name: Fit type
description: Describes the fit type for vehicle parts and accessories, like custom or universal

name: Lighting features
description: Describes special characteristics of lighting, like adjustable brightness or LED lighting

name: Suitable space
description: Defines the ideal location for product use, e.g. indoors, above ground

name: Manufacturer type
description: Specifies the source of vehicle parts or accessories, such as genuine or third-party

name: Hardware material
description: Specifies the composition of hardware items, such as metal or stainless steel

name: Spike design
description: Identifies the style of spikes, such as tent or landscape fabric

name: Display technology
description: Defines the type of screen technology used in a product, e.g. LED, e-ink

name: Timer type
description: Specifies the frequency setting for timers, e.g. daily, weekly

name: Bulb type
description: Specifies the type of bulb used in lighting products, e.g. LED, halogen

name: Bulb size
description: Specifies the size of light bulbs, e.g. A19, C7

name: Flower color
description: Specifies the color of the flower, such as pink or multicolor

name: Theme
description: Describes the product's primary theme or motif, such as sport, space, or holidays

name: Plant characteristics
description: Defines specific traits of plants, e.g. flowering, edible

name: Shape
description: Describes the geometric form or shape of a product, such as round or heart

name: Decoration material
description: Identifies the material used for decoration, such as sequins or feathers

name: Battery type
description: Distinguishes between types of batteries, such as disposable or rechargeable

name: Style
description: Describes the style of a product, typically for window treatments; e.g. vertical blind, pleated shades

name: Finish
description: Describes the surface quality of a product, like satin or matte

name: Ingress protection (IP) rating
description: Provides the official IP water/dust resistance rating the case complies with (e.g., IP68).

name: Motion sensor type
description: Identifies the technology used in motion sensors, such as infrared or laser

name: Light source
description: Identifies the kind of light bulb used in a product, such as LED or fluorescent

name: Switch control type
description: Describes how a light switch is controlled, such as button or sensor

name: Lampshade shape
description: Describes the geometrical shape or form of the lamp shade.

name: Connection type
description: Specifies the type of connection used by electronics, such as wired or Bluetooth

name: Light spectrum
description: Defines the range of light wavelengths a product can produce, e.g. blue light, infrared light

name: Candle type
description: Specifies the design of candles, such as taper or tea light

name: Bulb finish
description: Describes the external coating or finish of the bulb glass, which affects light diffusion and style.

name: Glazing material
description: Identifies the material covering the photo area (e.g., glass, acrylic, or none).

name: Battery size
description: Indicates the battery compatibility for the product, such as AAA or 9V
